title: Sana 0.6B Text-to-Image
description: Ultra-fast 1024×1024 text-to-image generation: ~1 second per image on RTX 4090 (18 steps). NVIDIA Sana 0.6B with DC-AE + Gemma 2 text encoder, 0.6B parameters, works on 4GB+ VRAM. Weights baked in — no network volume, no cold downloads. Supports seed control, negative prompts, configurable steps (4–30) and guidance scales. API: POST JSON with {prompt, negative_prompt, height, width, num_inference_steps, guidance_scale, seed} → {image_b64, prompt, seed, wall_time_s}. Apache-2.0 licensed.
